seoTitle: How to Add a Logo to Your Invoice in QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: Learn how to add your company logo to invoices in QuickBooks Online so your billing looks professional and reinforces your brand.
intro: A branded invoice looks more professional and helps customers instantly recognize who they're paying. This guide walks through adding your logo to invoices in QuickBooks Online.

steps.heading: Open your sales form settings
steps.body: Go to the settings area where invoice and sales form appearance is customized.

steps.heading: Upload your logo
steps.body: Choose the option to upload a logo image, selecting a clear, properly sized file from your computer.

steps.heading: Adjust the logo placement
steps.body: Position the logo where it looks best on the invoice template, such as the top corner.

steps.heading: Preview and save
steps.body: Preview an invoice to confirm the logo displays correctly, then save your settings.

faq.question: What image formats work for a logo upload?
faq.answer: Common formats like JPG and PNG are typically supported for logo uploads.

faq.question: Will the logo appear on all my invoice templates?
faq.answer: It depends on your settings, but you can usually apply the logo across all templates or just specific ones.

faq.question: Can I resize my logo after uploading it?
faq.answer: Yes, QuickBooks Online generally lets you adjust the size and position of the logo on the invoice.

faq.question: Does adding a logo affect invoice email formatting?
faq.answer: The logo will appear consistently whether the invoice is emailed, printed, or viewed online.
